breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: U.S. strikes Iran for 10th consecutive night as Tehran strikes tanker in the Strait of Hormuz
breaking.summary: U.S. strikes come as ships attacked; nearly 100 U.S. injuries since early July; Yemen rebels threaten attacks on other Mideast waterway; a glimmer of hope for diplomacy

breaking.title: Dream voyage ends in tragedy for Keralite as missile strike kills merchant navy officer weeks after wedding plans
breaking.summary: Akhil Joyan, a 26-year-old merchant navy officer from Kerala, was killed in a Russian missile strike on the MV Golden Leo near Odessa, Ukraine, just 40 days after returning to sea with plans to marry his fiancée next April.

breaking.title: Methane Gas Leak Triggered Sikkim Tunnel Collapse That Killed 10: Sources
breaking.summary: The workers feared trapped in the tinnel belong to different parts of the country.

breaking.title: Pepper Spray, Knife Attack: Criminal Killed At Relative's Birthday Bash
breaking.summary: Afroz, the brother of Salman (R) was accused with Nandanavanam Suri's murder (L).

breaking.title: Strike on Ukraine-bound gas tanker in Black Sea wounds three
breaking.summary: The Black Sea has been a regular theatre of confrontation between Ukraine and Russia since the Kremlin's full-scale invasion began in 2022

breaking.title: Rahul, Priyanka lead Congress leaders in protest outside PM's residence
breaking.summary: Karnataka CM D.K. Shivakumar and Kerala CM V.D. Satheesan also attend protest outside PM residence in Delhi

breaking.title: Martyrs' Day rally: Mamata calls for INDIA unity against BJP in Bengal, rules out return of TMC rebels
breaking.summary: Though she did not name the Congress or the CPI(M), her remarks were seen as an appeal to the TMC's INDIA bloc partners, with whom it has maintained an uneasy relationship in West Bengal despite being part of the national opposition alliance

breaking.title: Market wrap: Top gainers and losers on Nifty and Sensex today
breaking.summary: Indian benchmark indices extended losses on Tuesday, with the Sensex falling 238 points and the Nifty closing below 24,200. While HDFC Bank, Reliance Industries and SBI weighed on the benchmarks, broader markets outperformed as the Nifty Midcap 100 and Smallcap 100 indices ended higher despite geopolitical concerns.
